news.headline: CSD partners with VR startup Floreo to scale ABA virtual services for schools nationwide.
news.summary: A major provider in behavioral health, the Center for Social Dynamics (CSD), has recently announced their partnership with Floreo to enhance the provision of immersive, virtual reality (VR) autism therapy services in schools across the United States. This collaboration, effective as of April 3, 2025, aims to broaden the reach of these innovative services nationwide. The CSD, renowned for its expertise in behavioral health, will leverage Floreo's VR technology to deliver tailored therapy to individuals with autism within school settings. This strategic initiative underscores the commitment of both organizations to advancing access to specialized care for those in need.

news.headline: Qloo and JCDecaux use AI for hyper-localized DOOH campaigns, targeting consumers based on location-specific taste data.
news.summary: Qloo has introduced location-specific consumer taste data to help brands improve their targeting of out-of-home campaigns. On April 3, 2025, in New York, the AI provider revealed its latest development. This technology is designed to assist companies in tailoring their marketing efforts to reach consumers more effectively.

news.headline: Bishop Mariann Edgar Budde to preach Palm Sunday sermon at Grace Cathedral in San Francisco on April 13 at 11 a.m.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025 in San Francisco, the Rt. Rev. Mariann Edgar Budde, the Bishop of the Episcopal Diocese of Washington and spiritual leader of Washington National Cathedral, is scheduled to give the Palm Sunday sermon at Grace Cathedral on April 13 at 11 a.m. This event will be attended by a large congregation and is expected to draw significant media coverage due to the high profile of the speaker.

news.headline: Kevin O'Leary and Dave Portnoy to speak at Consensus Toronto, world's top crypto event. Biggest names join lineup.
news.summary: The Toronto 2025 event hosted by Consensus, the renowned crypto and blockchain conference, is set to feature two prominent figures from the business world. Kevin O'Leary, Chairman of O'Leary Ventures, is among the high-profile speakers expected to attend the event. Being the world's longest-running and most influential gathering in the crypto and blockchain sector, Consensus is bringing together key players from the industry. The event is scheduled to take place in Toronto on April 3, 2025, and is anticipated to draw a large audience, including significant numbers of professionals, enthusiasts, and experts in the field.

news.headline: Papa Johns partners with Google Cloud for AI upgrades to enhance customer experience, including predicting personalized cravings and optimizing delivery routes.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Google Cloud revealed an extended multi-year partnership aimed at enhancing the Papa Johns customer experience. The collaboration is set to leverage AI technology to anticipate individual cravings and enhance delivery routes. This strategic move is expected to revolutionize the customer journey for Papa Johns. The partnership was confirmed on April 3, 2025, in Atlanta and Sunnyvale, California. This initiative marks a significant step forward in the company's commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Spin Master Corp. will report Q1 2025 financials on April 30, 2025.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Spin Master Corp. ("Spin Master"), a prominent children's entertainment company, announced that it will disclose its first quarter financial results for 2025 after the market closes on April 30, 2025. The details will be shared in a conference call featuring Max Rangel, the Global President. Spin Master's stock is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol TOY. The company's performance will be revealed in this report, which investors and stakeholders eagerly anticipate.

news.headline: New research: Mid-size companies see major increase in online benefits enrollment - most employees using internet/intranet for enrollment.
news.summary: A significant majority of mid-sized companies provide a minimum of one voluntary benefit as per recent data. Most employees from these companies opt to enroll in their benefits through online platforms like the internet or intranet, using devices such as computers, tablets, or smartphones. This trend is observed in approximately X% of mid-size employers, indicating a growing preference for digital enrollment methods among employees.

news.headline: Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL) to announce Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025, after the market opens.
news.summary: Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL) has disclosed that the financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025, will be officially released on Thursday, May 1, 2025, before the market opens. The company urges all individuals interested in this information to participate in the upcoming webcast.

news.headline: ConnectM to consider $46.5M buy-out offer, with a $1.60 per share proposal. Technology company in energy sector.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, technology company ConnectM Technology Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: CNTM) based in Marlborough, MA, disclosed a non-binding proposal offering $1.60 per share. ConnectM, a rapidly expanding company in the energy economy sector, is at the forefront of technological advancements. This proposal underscores external interest in the company's future growth and potential.

news.headline: U.K. efforts fail to secure exemption from 10% tariff, as Trump imposes base rate on all countries despite royal invitation.
news.summary: Despite efforts by Prime Minister Keir Starmer to build rapport, President Trump announced that the U.K. would face the standard base rate imposed on all nations.

news.headline: Secured overnight financing rate 4.37% April 2nd vs 4.39% April 1st.
Cizzle Brands' CWENCH Hydration is now USA Hockey's official partner, reaching over 1 million players, coaches, and officials.
news.summary: In Toronto, Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTCQB: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) has revealed that CWENCH Hydration™ is now the endorsed hydration partner of USA Hockey. This partnership is with the national governing body for ice hockey in the US, boasting over one million individuals including players, coaches, officials, and volunteers. CWENCH Hydration™ will prominently feature at USA Hockey player development programs, strengthening their presence significantly.

news.headline: Global markets plunged as concerns rose over Trump's new tariffs, causing widespread dismay among policymakers and trade partners.
news.summary: On Thursday, worldwide markets experienced a sharp decline, sparked by concern from policymakers and trade allies over the president's recent aggressive trade measures.

news.headline: Counterfeit Android phones with malware target 2,600+ users using Triada Trojan, stealing crypto.
news.summary: The Triada Trojan has impacted more than 2,600 users, causing issues such as call hijacking, cryptocurrency theft, and compromising messaging apps.

news.headline: Nykredit Realkredit A/S is fixing coupon rates for a deal worth 500 million euros.
Pole Star Global appoints 2 key executives to speed up innovation and growth in maritime intelligence.
news.summary: In a joint announcement on April 3, 2025, in London and New York, Pole Star Global, a renowned provider of maritime intelligence and regulatory compliance solutions, revealed the recruitment of two crucial executives. This move is expected to expedite the company's efforts in providing cutting-edge maritime risk analytics. The new executives are set to play a pivotal role in steering the company towards achieving its goals and enhancing its services.

news.headline: 2,600 users hit by Triada Trojan, sold on fake Android phones with malware that steals crypto: Kaspersky.
news.summary: More than 2,600 individuals have fallen victim to the Triada Trojan, a malicious software that takes control of phone calls, siphons off cryptocurrency, and infiltrates messaging applications.

news.headline: US sanctions 8 crypto wallets linked to Garantex & Houthis, moving $1B+ for Houthi operations. Source: Chainalysis. Houthis threaten American security, marked as terrorist org. Garantex, a Russian exchange involved in money laundering, now rebooted as Grinex. Arrests made.
news.summary: The US Treasury Department imposed sanctions on eight cryptocurrency wallet addresses tied to Russian crypto exchange Garantex and the Houthis, with data suggesting they moved around $1 billion in funds related to sanctioned entities. Most transactions supported Houthi operations in Yemen and the Red Sea area. This move signifies the growing understanding of crypto's involvement in geopolitical conflicts and terrorism financing. The involvement of the Houthis in these transactions raises concerns due to their destabilizing activities, prompting regulatory changes and increased scrutiny on decentralized platforms. The Houthis are a Yemeni political and armed group that has engaged in attacks in the Red Sea, leading to their designation as a foreign terrorist organization. On the other hand, Garantex, labeled as Russia's crypto "laundromat," was shut down for alleged money-laundering activities, with Tether freezing $27 million on the platform. An individual linked to Garantex was arrested for money laundering and other related charges.

news.headline: Minesto discloses warrant exercise outcome for series TO4 and directs issues to underwriter; Press release restrictions in multiple countries.
news.summary: This press release should not be disclosed, published, or distributed in the United States, Australia, Canada, Hong Kong, Japan, New Zealand, Singapore, South Africa, South Korea, Switzerland, Russia, Belarus, or any other jurisdiction where it is prohibited.

news.headline: Patten Properties sees 141% sales surge Nov-Jan at Pecan Plantation, Texas acreage community in Fort Worth.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, Pecan Plantation, a Texas acreage community under Patten Properties, saw a remarkable 141% boost in sales from November to January compared to the previous year. This surge reflects the community's rapid expansion and growing demand.

news.headline: Argus Research begins coverage on Golden Matrix Group, Inc. (NasdaqCM: GMGI) on April 3, 2025, with full report available online.
news.summary: A recent report conducted by Argus Research, an independent investment research firm, has unveiled their Equity Research Report on Golden Matrix Group, Inc. (NasdaqCM: GMGI). This report includes a comprehensive analysis of the company's performance and insights for potential investors. Key highlights indicate promising prospects for Golden Matrix Group, Inc. as detailed in the Argus Equity Research Report. This announcement was made on April 3, 2025, showcasing the continued growth and significance of GMGI in the market. For the full report, interested parties are encouraged to visit the provided link for a more in-depth look into the findings. This move indicates a step towards greater transparency and awareness for investors looking to engage with GMGI, as the firm is taking strategic steps to provide more visibility into its operations and potential.

news.headline: Capsida's CAP-003 shows promising results for Parkinson's disease, with GCase elevations surpassing efficacy threshold. Advancing to clinical development in 1H25.
news.summary: Capsida Biotherapeutics ("Capsida") has reported that GCase elevations have significantly surpassed the efficacy threshold, with a well-tolerated safety profile and support for IV-administration. These positive results have led to advancing CAP-003 into clinical development in the first half of 2025. The company, based in Thousand Oaks, California, announced this new data on April 3, 2025.

news.headline: Jeffs’ Brands completes Android version of AI-based pest control app, ready for Google Play. (Characters: 89)
news.summary: Tel Aviv, Israel, April  03, 2025 - Jeffs' Brands Ltd ("Jeffs’ Brands" or "the Company") (Nasdaq: JFBR, JFBRW) is a data-driven e-commerce company on the Amazon Marketplace. The subsidiary, Fort Products Limited ("Fort"), has finished internal testing for its AI-based pest control app on Android. Following the prior update on March 27, 2025, the app is now being readied for submission to the Google Play Store for assessment. Once approved, users can access the app.

news.headline: Global stocks plunge as Trump tariff shock hits markets. Asia, Europe markets tumble, Wall Street set to extend losses. Allies, foes assess impact.
news.summary: Stock markets in Asia and Europe experienced significant drops in their values, with the trend expected to continue as Wall Street prepares to open. Investors globally are closely monitoring the situation as they assess potential strategies in response to the market downturn.

news.headline: ECB Account: Outlook for exports a is major concern.
ECB Account: Both a cut and a pause are on the table in April.
In 1930, golfer Bobby Jones made history by winning the Grand Slam, a feat unmatched in golf.
news.summary: In 1930, golfer Bobby Jones achieved a remarkable feat in the sport that has yet to be matched by anyone else. Jones' performance not only made history but also significantly elevated the status of The Masters Tournament, turning it into a globally recognized event. This accomplishment solidified Jones' legacy in golf and continues to be celebrated by fans and players worldwide.

news.headline: Article discusses importance of setting adaptable goals. Emphasizes forces beyond control impacting progress. From Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Setting goals and working towards your dreams is important, however, unforeseen circumstances can hinder your advancement. It is crucial to adapt to changing circumstances in order to stay on course towards achieving your aspirations. Remember, flexibility is key in navigating through unexpected challenges.

news.headline: ECB Account: Few wanted to avoid signaling further rate cuts.
Accuray CyberKnife® benefits CNS tumors; studies present at meeting. Advances for quality care, expanding options.
news.summary: Accuray Incorporated (NASDAQ: ARAY) has recently disclosed new data on the advancements made using the CyberKnife System in healthcare. These innovations have enabled high-quality care to become accessible to a broader population, particularly those with limited healthcare options. The data, released on April 3, 2025, showcases the positive impact of these clinical developments. Accuray Incorporated continues to lead the way in healthcare technology, offering groundbreaking solutions that are revolutionizing patient care.

news.headline: Alterity Therapeutics to present positive ATH434 Phase 2 trial results at AAN 2025 Annual Meeting in San Diego.
news.summary: Alterity Therapeutics, a biotech firm focusing on disease-modifying treatments for neurodegenerative conditions, revealed its plans to present at the American Academy of Neurology 2025 Annual Meeting in San Diego, CA. The company will deliver an oral presentation and present a poster on its clinical programs for Multiple System Atrophy (MSA). The event, scheduled from April 5 to April 9, 2025, will be a platform for Alterity to showcase its advancements. The firm's dual listing on ASX and NASDAQ under the tickers ATH and ATHE respectively, highlights its global presence and commitment to innovation in the field.

news.headline: Tiktok faces fine over €500 million for EU data sent to China.
ISI buys back ISK 2.880 million nominal of ICESEA 25 06 bonds at a price of 100,8715 per bond after auction. Settlement on April 7, 2025.
news.summary: During ISI’s bond auction for ICESEA 28 10, holders of ICESEA 25 06 were given the opportunity to sell their holdings at a fixed clean price of 100,8715 in exchange for subscriptions in the auction. This resulted in ISI repurchasing ISK 2.880 million in nominal value of ICESEA 25 06. The settlement for this exchange is scheduled for April 7th, 2025, and the offering process is being overseen by Arion Bank Capital Markets.

news.headline: 101 Mobility partners with Welcome Home Angel to transform homes for children with special healthcare needs in Wilmington, N.C. - April 3, 2025.
news.summary: In Wilmington, North Carolina, on April 3, 2025, 101 Mobility, a prominent provider of mobility and accessibility solutions nationwide, has revealed a recent collaboration with Welcome Home Angel, a nonprofit focused on renovating the homes of children dealing with chronic illnesses.

news.headline: ECB Account: No longer clear whether policy still restrictive.
ECB Accounts: It was argued that it was no longer possible to be confident that monetary policy was restrictive.
SCIVAX+TSLC develop world's smallest PPG sensor head, to be presented at Touch Taiwan exhibition.
news.summary: In Kawasaki, Japan, SCIVAX Corporation and TSLC Corporation, a subsidiary of SemiLEDs Corporation (NASDAQ: LEDS), have collaborated to create the smallest PPG sensor head globally. This innovative technology will debut at the "Touch Taiwan" display-related technology exhibition in Taipei. SCIVAX, led by President Satoru Tanaka, unveiled this breakthrough, showcasing their capabilities in miniaturization and sensor development. The partnership aims to revolutionize the field of PhotoPlethysmoGraphy with this groundbreaking sensor design, marking a significant advancement in the industry's capabilities.

news.headline: PAR Tech celebrates leaders in loyalty with the sixth annual PAR Punchh Customer Awards. Brands recognized for delivering outstanding personalization and engagement to boost customer lifetime value.
news.summary: ParTech, Inc. disclosed the winners of the sixth annual PAR Punchh® Customer Awards, showcasing brands that achieved excellence in 1:1 personalization and engagement to enhance customer lifetime value. The global restaurant technology company recognized businesses that excelled in this area, setting new benchmarks. This year's awards honored those who demonstrated outstanding performance in catering to individual customer needs, resulting in enhanced customer loyalty and satisfaction. The remarkable achievements of these brands were acknowledged for their significant impact on driving customer engagement and increasing customer lifetime value.

ECB Accounts: The combination of US tariffs and retaliation measures could also pose upside risks to inflation.
Credit risk for US investment grade climbs most since August.
ECB Accounts: Significant expansion of fiscal policy linked to defence had the potential to derail the disinflation process.
ECB Accounts: Uncertainty called for caution in policy-setting and especially in communication.

Richard Quesnel, CEO of Consolidated Lithium Metals Inc., acquires 10M units for $0.01 each, totaling $100K. His ownership now stands at 28.87M Common Shares, representing 7.42% of outstanding shares (non-diluted).
news.summary: Richard Quesnel, CEO of Consolidated Lithium Metals Inc., purchased 10,000,000 units of the company at $0.01 each, costing $100,000. Each unit includes one common share and half a share purchase warrant. Before this, Quesnel owned 18,873,000 common shares, 9,000,000 warrants, and 5,000,000 options, making up 5.12% of the outstanding shares non-diluted and 8.60% diluted. After the transaction, he now owns 28,873,000 shares, 14,000,000 warrants, and 5,000,000 options, accounting for 7.42% of outstanding shares non-diluted and 11.72% diluted.

news.headline: MariMed's Betty's Eddies introduces THC & CBG-infused Caramel Chews to expand its top-selling brand.
news.summary: Betty's Eddies, a product line under MariMed, has broadened its popular brand by launching new THC and CBG-infused caramel chews. This expansion aims to cater to a wider consumer base seeking edibles with additional cannabinoids. The move comes as part of MariMed's strategy to diversify its offerings and capitalize on the growing demand for cannabis-infused products. The caramel chews are expected to attract customers looking for alternative consumption methods, especially those interested in the therapeutic benefits of cannabinoids. This development demonstrates MariMed's commitment to innovation and market expansion in the cannabis industry.

news.headline: Incannex Healthcare finishes Phase 2 enrollment for RePOSA trial of IHL-42X for sleep apnea, awaiting Phase 2 data by H1 2025.
news.summary: Anticipated to be released in the initial half of 2025, the top-line results from Phase 2 clinical trials are eagerly awaited. This significant data is set to provide crucial insights into the efficacy and safety of the treatment being examined. Stakeholders and experts are looking forward to analyzing the outcomes and determining the next steps based on the data. The findings from this phase hold immense importance as they will influence the decision-making process moving forward in the development and potential approval of the product.

news.headline: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings to acquire Thrive Skilled Pediatric Care, deal expected to close in Q2 2025.
news.summary: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AVAH) based in Atlanta revealed on April 3, 2025, that it will acquire Thrive Skilled Pediatric Care. Thrive SPC focuses on providing care to medically complex and high-cost patient populations. The agreement is set to finalize in the second quarter of 2025 pending regular regulatory clearances. This strategic move signifies Aveanna's goal to enhance its diversified home care platform and expand its reach in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Intellia Therapeutics doses first patient in MAGNITUDE-2 Phase 3 trial of gene editing treatment for ATTRv-PN.
news.summary: Intellia Therapeutics, Inc., a prominent gene editing company listed on NASDAQ (NTLA), recently disclosed that they have initiated the dosing of the inaugural patient in the MAGNITUDE-2 trial on April 3, 2025. This pivotal Phase 3 trial is being conducted worldwide and focuses on assessing the efficacy of their drug, nexiguran ziclumeran (nex-z), in treating hereditary ATTR amyloidosis with polyneuropathy (ATTRv-PN). With this milestone advancement, Intellia continues its innovation in leveraging CRISPR-based therapies to transform the medical field.

news.headline: Serve Robotics launches autonomous delivery in Dallas-Fort Worth via Uber Eats, plans to deploy 2,000 robots in the US by 2025.
news.summary: Serve Robotics Inc. unveiled the commencement of its autonomous sidewalk delivery service in the Dallas-Fort Worth metro area. Partnering with Uber Eats, a delivery platform under Uber Technologies Inc., Serve's deployment marks a significant advancement in their objective to introduce 2,000 AI-driven delivery robots nationwide by the conclusion of 2025.

news.headline: Top Kingwin Ltd's subsidiary plans to launch Desktop Robot 1.0, blending AI with emotional interaction for a smarter office.
news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, on April 3, 2025, Top Kingwin Ltd (NASDAQ: WAI) shared exciting news that its subsidiary, Shenzhen Tiancheng Chuangxin Technology Co., Ltd. ("Chuangxin Tech"), is gearing up to launch its self-created Desktop Robot 1.0. This cutting-edge offering will combine artificial intelligence (AI) with emotional interaction to provide a more intelligent and empathetic office and lifestyle encounter.
